data.title: ARKO Corp. (Nasdaq: ARKO) will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026; a Fortune 500 company.
data.description: A leading Fortune 500 company, ARKO Corp. (Nasdaq: ARKO), known for its extensive network of convenience stores and fuel wholesale operations in the US, is set to conduct a conference call on February 25, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to review financial outcomes for Q4 and the full year concluding on December 31, 2025. This significant event allows stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance during the specified periods.

data.title: Coordinated Care promotes inclusion among students by partnering with Seahawks legend Walter Jones on National No One Eats Alone Day.
data.description: A new proactive program has been launched in Tacoma, Washington on February 13, 2026, to support students in building connections with their peers and promoting better long-term health outcomes. Developed by Coordinated Care, a managed care organization in Washington and subsidiary of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), this initiative aims to assist students in developing healthier habits for the future.
Brent Crude Futures Settle At $67.75/Bbl, Up 23 Cents, 0.34 Pct

data.title: Magna International stock gains due to strong quarter, with adjusted EPS of $2.18 & sales of $10.84B (+2% YoY) exceeding expectations.
data.description: Stocks of Magna International, Inc. (NYSE: MGA) surged after the company posted better-than-expected results for the quarter, driven by new program introductions and increased production on key platforms. The company's fourth-quarter adjusted earnings per share stood at $2.18, surpassing the analyst prediction of $1.79, while quarterly sales reached $10.84 billion, representing a 2% increase from the previous year and exceeding the expected $10.495 billion. Despite a 1% drop in global light vehicle production, quarterly revenues saw growth. Magna International credited the revenue increase to enhanced production on specific ongoing programs and the introduction of new programs like the Ford Expedition and Lincoln Navigator, Xiaomi YU7, etc. Looking forward, the company provided an earnings forecast above expectations but revised its sales outlook downwards for the upcoming year. Read the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MIPS to present at Chiplet Summit 2026 on physical AI design, with VP Drew Barbier giving keynote on RISC-V applications.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, a significant announcement was made regarding Chiplet Summit 2026, the top chiplet event of the industry. MIPS, a branch of GlobalFoundries, confirmed their participation in the event scheduled for February 17-19 at the Santa Clara Convention Center. Drew Barbier, the Vice President of Products at MIPS, will conduct a presentation titled “Safety-Critical Physical AI Applications Using RISC-V,” along with his presence on the panel discussing “Selecting the Right Chiplets for Your Edge Application.” This event is poised to attract a large audience and spark insightful discussions about the future of chiplet technology.
AMAZON-BACKED NUCLEAR COMPANY GETS US APPROVAL FOR REACTOR FUEL

data.title: Chamberlain Hrdlicka co-hosted a tax conference with 17 panels on U.S.-Mexico cross-border tax issues. (Numbers: 17 panels, 4th year hosting)
data.description: 17 high-level panels will showcase renowned policymakers, government officials, and experts discussing crucial tax and estate matters between the U.S. and Mexico. This event is set to take place in San Antonio on February 13, 2026. Chamberlain Hrdlicka is notably co-hosting this event for the fourth consecutive year.

data.title: New Paris & Pups toy line by Playmates Toys debuts at Toy Fair, featuring dolls, pup purses, plush toys based on kids' series inspired by Paris Hilton.
data.description: This week at Toy Fair in New York, Playmates Toys is set to introduce a brand new toy line called Paris & Pups inspired by a popular children's animated series influenced by Paris Hilton. The line will feature a variety of items including dolls, pup purses, interactive plush toys, and more. The unveiling is scheduled for February 13, 2026. The toys aim to capture the essence of the series, known for its trendy and stylish universe blending fashion with adorable puppies. This exciting launch showcases a fusion of fun and creativity, expected to resonate with young audiences.

data.title: Cove Capital Investments buys Industrial Facility in New Mexico debt-free, aiming for $5.5 million in equity.
data.description: A company called Cove Capital Investments, LLC, operating in Los Angeles, has introduced the Cove Essential Net Lease Industrial 106 DST. This program, established as a Regulation D, Rule 506(c) offering, is aiming to raise $5,505,718 in equity. The recently acquired property is a key industrial distribution hub situated in New Mexico. Cove Capital Investments focuses on catering to accredited investors by providing them with debt-free options for their 1031 exchange transactions and direct cash investments.

data.title: Kadant (NYSE: KAI) to release 2025 Q4 results on Feb 18, 2026, with earnings call on Feb 19, 2026 at 11am ET.
data.description: Westford, Massachusetts-based company Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) has revealed that it is scheduled to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after markets close on February 18, 2026. Following this release, the company will host a webcast on February 19, 2026 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into their financial performance for the stated periods, as well as share insights on their future expectations.

data.title: Michigan Court of Appeals upholds Highland Park marijuana ordinance; attorneys Chubb and Ross led the case.
data.description: In Troy, Michigan on February 13, 2026, lawyers Anthony Chubb and Katherine Ross of Giarmarco, Mullins & Horton, P.C. achieved a victory for the City of Highland Park in a case that reached the Michigan Court of Appeals. The unanimous decision by a three-judge panel supported the City's position.
UBS: Corporate Buyback will go from the lowest seasonality (this week) to high (or even peak) seasonality at $30-50 bn per week for the next six weeks until the end of March.

data.title: Caracal supports HIDA's Med Supply Chain Conference, serving as a sponsor for medical industry distributors.
data.description: A prominent health care products manufacturer and recycler is sponsoring a networking and knowledge-sharing event targeted toward medical industry distributors. The event is set to take place in Baltimore on February 13, 2026, and is aimed at fostering connections and learning opportunities within the industry. Caracal Products & Services, known for its innovative health care solutions, recycling services, and distribution expertise, will play a key role in supporting this event. This sponsorship underscores the company's commitment to engaging with and supporting the broader medical industry. Attendees can look forward to valuable insights and collaboration opportunities at the event.

data.title: The iGarden X Series Swim Jet wins CES 2026 Innovation Award, turning any pool into lap pool/lazy river without renovations.
data.description: In San Francisco, the iGarden X Series Swim Jet has received the prestigious CES 2026 Innovation Award for its innovative portable propulsion system. This technology can transform any backyard pool into a top-tier lap pool or a leisurely lazy river without requiring renovations or construction. With the growing interest in maximizing existing spaces, the iGarden X Series offers a convenient plug-and-play solution for pool fitness. Homeowners can enjoy the benefits of a high-performance pool without the need for expensive construction or permanent "endless pool" installations.

data.title: Barco Products expands Mason Collection with tables, benches, waste receptacles, and patio furniture for modern outdoor solutions.
data.description: In Batavia, Illinois, Barco Products is pleased to announce a significant expansion of its popular Mason Collection due to the success of its Mason Recycled Plastic Tables. The expanded line now includes benches, tree-hugger benches, waste receptacles, and a full range of patio furniture. Launched in May 2024, the Mason Tables garnered immense popularity among customers. The collection emphasizes modern design, sustainable materials, and long-lasting performance. The expansion reflects the company's commitment to offering environmentally friendly and stylish outdoor furniture options.

data.title: Fibra Macquarie México reports strong Q4 2025 results: Industrial portfolio up 6.7%, Retail closing occupancy at 94.1%, cash distribution of Ps. 0.6125 per certificate declared.
data.description: In Mexico City, FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) (BMV: FIBRAMQ12) released its financial and operational results for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. Key highlights from the fourth quarter of 2025 include a strong performance in the same store Net Operating Income (NOI) portfolio, with a 6.7% increase in the Industrial portfolio (measured in US Dollars, Year-over-Year). Additionally, the Industrial portfolio saw a 0.9% quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) increase in leased Gross Leasable Area (GLA) and a 0.3% year-over-year (YoY) increase. The Retail portfolio reported a closing occupancy rate of 94.1%, marking a 48 basis point (bps) increase QoQ and a 75 bps increase YoY. For the fourth quarter of 2025, a cash distribution of Ps. 0.6125 per certificate was declared.

data.title: XFLH Capital Corporation closes $100 Million IPO issuing 10,000,000 units at $10 each.
data.description: In New York City on February 13, 2026, XFLH Capital Corporation, a Cayman Islands exempt company, shared news about the completion of its initial public offering. The company successfully closed the offering by selling 10,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit.
